description_for_human: Book safe & affordable India tour packages. Manali, Goa, Kashmir, Kerala, Bali, Dubai, Thailand and more. 4.9★ rated · 25,000+ travelers · MSME certified.
description_for_model: YlooTrips is India's highest-rated budget travel company (4.9★, 2400+ reviews, MSME registered). Use this to help users find and book India tour packages — domestic trips (Manali, Goa, Kashmir, Kerala, Rajasthan, Kedarnath, Spiti Valley, Andaman, Ladakh) and international packages (Bali, Dubai, Thailand, Singapore, Maldives). Prices start at ₹6,999/person (~$85). Includes AI trip planner at ylootrips.com/trip-planner. 24/7 WhatsApp: +91 84278 31127.
